builder_profile.name: Mathieu
builder_profile.goal: maximize expected prize value while building something reusable

opportunity.title: CROO Agent Hackathon
requirements: Listed on CROO Agent Store — discoverable by humans and other agents
Integrated with CAP — agent is callable, settles on-chain
Open source — public GitHub repo with MIT / Apache 2.0 / similar permissive license
Demo + README — max 5-min demo video, setup instructions, SDK methods used, integration notes
BUIDL filed on DoraHacks — all required fields completed
opportunity.notes: Visible stats: 33 BUIDLs, 184 hackers, 18 days left. Reward flags mention <3 unique counterparty agents and <5 unique buyer wallets.
